items.title: Surprised with how good the comments on github gists are.
items.title_zh: 对 github gists 上的评论如此之好感到惊讶。
items.description: Surprised with how good the comments on github gists are. A lot more helpful, insightful, constructive, a lot less AI... Is it the user community? The markdown format? The (lack of) incentives? Suddenly feeling like I should gist more. @gi…
items.description_zh: 对 github gists 上的评论如此之好感到惊讶。更有帮助、更有洞察力、更有建设性，但人工智能却少得多……是用户社区吗？降价格式？ （缺乏）激励措施？突然觉得自己应该多提点。 @gi…

items.title: What are some good examples of open source winning vs.
items.title_zh: 有哪些开源软件胜出的好例子？
items.description: What are some good examples of open source winning vs. proprietary tech? In mobile for example, Android has the most market share but iOS still captures the majority of profits. Seems like both can win?
items.description_zh: 开源技术与专有技术相比有哪些好的例子？以移动设备为例，Android 拥有最大的市场份额，但 iOS 仍然占据了大部分利润。看来双方都能赢？

items.title_zh: 为什么 OpenAI 不关注 @embirico（Codex 产品负责人）的路线图：“在 @OpenAI，你们……
items.description: Why OpenAI doesn't focus on roadmaps from @embirico (Codex product lead): "At @OpenAI, you either plan near or long-term, but you never plan medium-term. It's just too difficult. Near-term is up to eight weeks from now. What is a concrete…
items.description_zh: 为什么 OpenAI 不关注 @embirico（Codex 产品负责人）的路线图：“在 @OpenAI，你要么制定近期计划，要么制定长期计划，但你从不计划中期。这太困难了。近期是从现在起长达八周的时间。什么是具体的……

items.title: The @vercel team is always listening and engaging with customers on @x.
items.title_zh: @vercel 团队始终在 @x 上倾听客户并与客户互动。
items.description: The @vercel team is always listening and engaging with customers on @x. We shape the product as a result of these conversations. Vercel gives us the velocity to ship, X gives us a nonstop stream of user feedback. Thanks @simhskal & @ri…

items.title: There are far more categories where AI agents making things more efficient will induce de…
items.title_zh: 在更多类别中，人工智能代理使事情变得更有效率将导致……
items.description: There are far more categories where AI agents making things more efficient will induce demand for that skill than spaces where agents eliminate the work. This is why the AI jobs predictions will not play out as advertised. AI making it eas…
items.description_zh: 与人工智能代理消除工作的领域相比，人工智能代理使事情变得更有效率的类别会引发对该技能的需求。这就是为什么人工智能的就业预测不会像广告中那样实现。人工智能让一切变得简单……
